message:
fix(dingtalk,qq,wecom): redact tokens in Debug output and enable token error retries

Security:
- Implement custom Debug for AccessTokenResponse in dingtalk, qq, and wecom
  to redact access_token as [REDACTED], preventing credential leaks in logs
- Simplify token error messages to avoid leaking auth response body details

Operational resilience:
- Make Token(_) errors retryable in is_retryable() — token failures are
  often transient (expired cache, rate limits) and should trigger retry
- Standardize OP_HEALTH → CAP_HEALTH_READ capability ID across all three
  connectors for consistent capability naming

Includes tests for secret redaction and retryability classification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -622,7 +622,7 @@ fn operation(
                 "Group routes must use the `chat:` prefix with an openConversationId.".into(),
             ],
             examples: Vec::new(),
-            related: vec![CapabilityId::from_static(OP_HEALTH)],
+            related: vec![CapabilityId::from_static(CAP_HEALTH_READ)],
         },
         rate_limit: None,
         requires_approval: Some(ApprovalMode::None),
